text_original: When we renounce learning we have no troubles.
text_normalized: When we renounce learning we have no troubles.

text_original: Small is the difference they display.
text_normalized: Small is the difference they display.

text_original: But mark their issues, good and ill;
text_normalized: But mark their issues, good and ill;

text_original: What space the gulf between shall fill?
text_normalized: What space the gulf between shall fill?

text_original: What all men fear is indeed to be feared; but how wide and without end is the range of questions (asking to be discussed)!
text_normalized: What all men fear is indeed to be feared; but how wide and without end is the range of questions (asking to be discussed)!

text_original: The multitude of men look satisfied and pleased; as if enjoying a full banquet, as if mounted on a tower in spring.
text_normalized: The multitude of men look satisfied and pleased; as if enjoying a full banquet, as if mounted on a tower in spring.

text_original: I alone seem listless and still, my desires having as yet given no indication of their presence.
text_normalized: I alone seem listless and still, my desires having as yet given no indication of their presence.

text_original: I am like an infant which has not yet smiled.
text_normalized: I am like an infant which has not yet smiled.

text_original: I look dejected and forlorn, as if I had no home to go to.
text_normalized: I look dejected and forlorn, as if I had no home to go to.

text_original: The multitude of men all have enough and to spare.
text_normalized: The multitude of men all have enough and to spare.

text_original: I alone seem to have lost everything.
text_normalized: I alone seem to have lost everything.

text_original: My mind is that of a stupid man;
text_normalized: My mind is that of a stupid man;

text_original: I am in a state of chaos.
text_normalized: I am in a state of chaos.

text_original: Ordinary men look bright and intelligent, while I alone seem to be benighted.
text_normalized: Ordinary men look bright and intelligent, while I alone seem to be benighted.

text_original: They look full of discrimination, while I alone am dull and confused.
text_normalized: They look full of discrimination, while I alone am dull and confused.

text_original: I seem to be carried about as on the sea, drifting as if I had nowhere to rest.
text_normalized: I seem to be carried about as on the sea, drifting as if I had nowhere to rest.

text_original: All men have their spheres of action, while I alone seem dull and incapable, like a rude borderer.
text_normalized: All men have their spheres of action, while I alone seem dull and incapable, like a rude borderer.

text_original: (Thus) I alone am different from other men, but I value the nursing-mother (the Dao).
text_normalized: (Thus) I alone am different from other men, but I value the nursing-mother (the Dao).
